name: coinbuddy
description: Your DeFi companion pet - zero seed phrase, maximum yield
author: CoinBuddy Team

scripts.build: node -e "const {spawnSync}=require('child_process');const {writeFileSync,unlinkSync}=require('fs');const {join}=require('path');const {tmpdir}=require('os');const {pathToFileURL}=require('url');const loader=join(tmpdir(),'coinbuddy-plasmo-loader.mjs');const code=['export async function resolve(specifier, context, nextResolve) {','  if (specifier === \'package-json\') {','    return {','      url: \'data:text/javascript,\' + encodeURIComponent(\'export default async function packageJson(){return {version:\"0.90.5\"};}\'),','      shortCircuit: true,','    };','  }','  return nextResolve(specifier, context);','}'].join('\\n');writeFileSync(loader,code);try{const result=spawnSync(process.execPath,[join(process.cwd(),'node_modules','plasmo','dist','index.js'),'build'],{stdio:'inherit',env:{...process.env,NODE_OPTIONS:'--loader '+pathToFileURL(loader).href}});process.exit(result.status??1)}finally{try{unlinkSync(loader)}catch{}}"
scripts.test: node --test --experimental-strip-types src/lib/chain-config.test.ts src/background/dialogue-state.test.ts src/background/wallet-resolve.test.ts src/background/withdraw-context.test.ts src/background/wallet-gate.test.ts src/background/session-cache.test.ts src/background/portfolio-normalize.test.ts src/background/quote-formatter.test.ts src/background/llm-client.test.ts src/background/lifi-client.test.ts src/background/handlers/invest.test.ts src/planner/normalize.test.ts src/popup-wallet-storage.test.ts src/background/planner/agent-planner.test.ts src/background/planner/step-executor.test.ts src/background/planner/action-registry.test.ts

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; object-src 'self'; frame-src 'self' https://*.coinbase.com https://exceptions.coinbase.com https://wallet.coinbase.com; connect-src 'self' https:; img-src 'self' data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline';
